title: thelymitra graminea
intro: Thelymitra graminea, also known as the grass orchid, is a terrestrial orchid native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelymitra graminea are thought to include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Thelymitra graminea typically involve drying the plant material and using it in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
